name: DataNexus MCP
description: AI-Ready public data intelligence. 30 tools in 7 focused sub-servers. Use search_datanexus_tools to find the right tool for your task. Nonprofit, security, compliance, domain, legal, GovCon, and regulatory data. Token-efficient AI-Ready Markdown. Verified sources.

tools.name: search_datanexus_tools
tools.description: Use this first. Find the right DataNexus tool by describing your task in plain English. Returns matching tools with usage instructions. Token-efficient entry point. AI-Ready Markdown. Verified source: DataNexus tool registry.

tools.name: nonprofit_fetch_nonprofit_by_ein
tools.description: Fetch IRS 990 data for any US nonprofit by EIN. Returns revenue, expenses, assets and mission in AI-Ready Markdown. Verified source: IRS EO BMF + IRS TEOS. Token-efficient.

tools.name: nonprofit_search_nonprofits_by_name
tools.description: Search US nonprofits by name. Returns top matches with EIN, NTEE code and state in AI-Ready Markdown. Verified source: IRS EO BMF. Token-efficient.

tools.name: nonprofit_fetch_charity_uk
tools.description: Fetch UK charity registration data from Charity Commission England and Wales. Returns income, activities and trustees in AI-Ready Markdown. Verified source: CCEW. Token-efficient.

tools.name: security_fetch_package_vulnerabilities
tools.description: Fetch all known CVEs for any open source package across PyPI, npm, Maven, Go, Cargo. Returns severity, CVSS score and fixed versions in AI-Ready Markdown. Verified source: Google OSV.dev + NIST NVD. Token-efficient.

tools.name: security_fetch_dependency_graph
tools.description: Fetch transitive dependency graph for a package version. Hard 8s timeout. Returns dependency tree in AI-Ready Markdown. Verified source: deps.dev (Google). Token-efficient.

tools.name: security_fetch_cve_detail
tools.description: Fetch full CVE detail by ID including CVSS v3 scores and affected CPEs. AI-Ready Markdown. Verified source: NIST NVD. Token-efficient.

tools.name: security_audit_sbom_vulnerabilities
tools.description: Audit a CycloneDX or SPDX SBOM against Google OSV.dev. Returns per-component vulnerability findings in AI-Ready Markdown. Verified source: OSV.dev. Token-efficient.

tools.name: security_fetch_package_licence
tools.description: Fetch SPDX licence identifier for any open source package version. AI-Ready Markdown. Verified source: deps.dev (Google). Token-efficient.

tools.name: compliance_fetch_npi_provider
tools.description: Fetch NPI registration for any US healthcare provider. Returns speciality, taxonomy and status in AI-Ready Markdown. Verified source: NPPES NPI Registry. Token-efficient.

tools.name: compliance_search_npi_by_name
tools.description: Search NPI registry by provider name with optional state and speciality filters. AI-Ready Markdown. Verified source: NPPES NPI Registry. Token-efficient.

tools.name: compliance_fetch_finra_broker
tools.description: Fetch FINRA BrokerCheck registration by CRD number. Returns licences, disclosures and employment history in AI-Ready Markdown. Verified source: FINRA BrokerCheck. Token-efficient.

tools.name: compliance_check_sam_exclusion
tools.description: Check federal exclusions list by name or EIN. Returns debarred and suspended entities in AI-Ready Markdown. Verified source: SAM.gov. Token-efficient.

tools.name: domain_fetch_domain_rdap
tools.description: Fetch domain registration via IANA RDAP. Returns registrar, expiry and nameservers in AI-Ready Markdown. Verified source: IANA RDAP. Token-efficient.

tools.name: domain_fetch_ssl_certificate_chain
tools.description: Fetch Certificate Transparency log certificates for a domain. Returns issuer, SANs and validity in AI-Ready Markdown. Verified source: crt.sh. Token-efficient.

tools.name: domain_fetch_dns_records
tools.description: Fetch A, AAAA, MX, TXT, NS, CNAME records for any domain. AI-Ready Markdown. Verified source: Cloudflare DoH. Token-efficient.

tools.name: domain_fetch_domain_history
tools.description: Fetch historical certificate issuance from CT logs to track domain ownership changes. AI-Ready Markdown. Verified source: crt.sh. Token-efficient.

tools.name: legal_fetch_patent_by_number
tools.description: Fetch patent details from EPO, USPTO or WIPO by number. Returns title, abstract, inventors and citations in AI-Ready Markdown. Verified source: EPO OPS + USPTO. Token-efficient.

tools.name: legal_search_patents_by_keyword
tools.description: Search EP, US and WO patents by keyword and date range. Returns matching patents in AI-Ready Markdown. Verified source: EPO OPS + USPTO. Token-efficient.

tools.name: legal_fetch_patent_citations
tools.description: Fetch forward and backward citations for a patent. Returns who cited it and what it cites in AI-Ready Markdown. Verified source: EPO OPS. Token-efficient.

tools.name: legal_fetch_inventor_portfolio
tools.description: Fetch patent portfolio for an inventor, optionally filtered by assignee. AI-Ready Markdown. Verified source: EPO OPS. Token-efficient.

tools.name: govcon_search_contract_awards
tools.description: Search government contract awards by keyword and agency. Returns award amounts, vendors and NAICS codes in AI-Ready Markdown. Verified source: USASpending.gov + SAM.gov. Token-efficient.

tools.name: govcon_fetch_vendor_contract_history
tools.description: Fetch full contract history for a specific vendor. Returns award totals, top agencies and contract types in AI-Ready Markdown. Verified source: USASpending.gov. Token-efficient.

tools.name: govcon_fetch_open_solicitations
tools.description: Fetch open bid opportunities matching a keyword. Returns due dates, set-aside types and agencies in AI-Ready Markdown. Verified source: SAM.gov + EU TED + UK Find-a-Tender. Token-efficient.

tools.name: regulatory_search_open_rulemakings
tools.description: Search open rulemakings and comment periods on Regulations.gov and Federal Register. Returns docket title, agency and deadline in AI-Ready Markdown. Verified source: Regulations.gov. Token-efficient.

tools.name: regulatory_fetch_docket_details
tools.description: Fetch full docket details by ID including documents, comments and agency contact. AI-Ready Markdown. Verified source: Regulations.gov. Token-efficient.

tools.name: regulatory_fetch_federal_register_notices
tools.description: Fetch recent Federal Register notices by agency. Returns type, publication date and abstract in AI-Ready Markdown. Verified source: Federal Register API. Token-efficient.

tools.name: report_feedback
tools.description: Report an incorrect, incomplete or stale DataNexus tool result. Always returns status recorded. AI-Ready output. Token-efficient.

tools.name: report_mcpize_link
tools.description: Check subscription status and retrieve upgrade URL if required. Token-efficient.

tools.name: validate_tool_output
tools.description: Validate any DataNexus tool response for data quality anomalies. Two-layer validation: deterministic rules plus Haiku AI review. Auto-files feedback on confirmed issues. AI-Ready output. Verified source: DataNexus internal validator. Token-efficient.
